sources.citation: Knight G. et al., Forensic Sci Int. 2010;202(1-3):36-44.
sources.evidence_scope: Controlled hydroponic ScrOG production under indoor conditions.
sources.notes: Used to anchor high-yield hydroponic performance ranges.
sources.variety_studied: NR (forensic indoor cannabis, seed category not declared)
sources.discrepancy_notes: Varieta e genetica non tracciate; studio forense non usato piu come ancoraggio primario per modello regular.

sources.citation: Saloner A. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2019;10:1369.
sources.evidence_scope: High-CBD medical cannabis cultivar response to K supply.
sources.notes: Supports cultivar-sensitive nutrient calibration and K windows.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Studio su cultivar medicale, accettato per finestra nutrizionale K con regola photoperiodic accepted.

sources.citation: Saloner A. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2020;11:572293.
sources.evidence_scope: Nitrogen supply impact on growth and cannabinoid profile.
sources.notes: Used for N range constraints and stage-specific response logic.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Applicato ai vincoli N in CEA; seed category non regular ma fotoperiodica compatibile.

sources.citation: Rodriguez-Morrison V. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2021;12:646020.
sources.evidence_scope: Cannabis inflorescence yield response to increasing light intensity.
sources.notes: Used for DLI demand scaling and photosaturation-aware optimization.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Fonte primaria per PPFD/DLI; sostituisce uso di ancore forensi non tracciabili.

sources.citation: Dowling A.V. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2022;12:797425.
sources.notes: Used for veg-duration and photoperiod switch tradeoff priors.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Usata per tradeoff switch fotoperiodo e durata vegetativa; corretta citazione Dowling (non Dang).

sources.evidence_scope: In vitro photoperiodic response differences among genotypes.
sources.notes: Supports explicit genotype and family-level phenology handling.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Supporto su sensibilita fotoperiodica di genotipo; non usata per resa assoluta.

sources.evidence_scope: Multi-cultivar flowering under 12 h versus longer photoperiod.
sources.notes: Supports non-fixed 12 h flower window in optimization bounds.

sources.evidence_scope: Flowering productivity under 12-14 h photoperiod treatments.
sources.notes: Used for upper flower photoperiod bounds and family priors.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Fonte principale per produttivita 12-14h in fioritura.

sources.citation: Rodriguez-Morrison V. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2021;12:725078.
sources.evidence_scope: Systematic UV treatment under controlled indoor production.
sources.notes: Supports conservative UVB contribution in quality objective.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Contributo UV-B conservativo allineato a evidenza controllata.

sources.citation: Holweg M.M.S.F. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2024;15:1393803.
sources.evidence_scope: Dual-red and white spectral combinations in flowering.
sources.notes: Used for spectral setpoint priorities in flower stages.
sources.variety_studied: Medical cannabis cultivar in indoor CEA
sources.discrepancy_notes: Valida i limiti spettrali in fioritura su cultivar fotoperiodiche.

sources.citation: Powell K. et al., Front Plant Sci. 2026;16:1753553.
sources.evidence_scope: Mass-balance nutrient uptake and irrigation management by cultivar.
sources.notes: Primary source for stage-wise NPK uptake dynamics and WUE handling.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Usata per dinamiche uptake NPK in vegetativa.

sources.citation: Pitman T.L. et al., Plant Disease. 2021;105(4):1230.
sources.evidence_scope: Root rot outbreak characterization in hydroponic cannabis.
sources.notes: Supports risk penalties for warm root zone and low dissolved oxygen.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Fonte fitosanitaria non dipendente da seed category; compatibile come rischio processo.

sources.evidence_scope: Hop latent viroid epidemiology and sanitation management.
sources.notes: Used for sanitation-linked HLVd pressure trajectories in the twin.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Evidenza di biosicurezza trasversale alle categorie di seme.

sources.evidence_scope: Genetic uniformity validation with SSR markers.
sources.notes: Supports clonal uniformity priors; used as auxiliary genetics evidence independent of seed category.
sources.discrepancy_notes: Supporta uniformita clonale, non dipende da tipo regular/feminized.
